title: Murder
description: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life and shall also be liable to fine.
punishment: Death or life imprisonment + fine

title: Culpable Homicide not amounting to Murder
description: Punishment for culpable homicide not amounting to murder.
punishment: Life imprisonment or up to 10 years + fine

title: Death by Negligence
description: Causing death by rash or negligent act not amounting to culpable homicide.
punishment: Up to 5 years + fine

title: Dowry Death
description: Where death of a woman is caused by burns or bodily injury within 7 years of marriage and it is shown that she was subjected to cruelty for dowry.
punishment: Minimum 7 years, up to life imprisonment

title: Abetment of Suicide
description: If any person commits suicide, whoever abets the commission shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 10 years + fine

title: Attempt to Murder
description: Whoever attempts to commit murder and causes hurt shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 10 years + fine; life imprisonment if hurt caused

title: Attempt to Commit Suicide
description: Whoever attempts to commit suicide shall be punished (decriminalized for mental health cases under MHA 2017).
punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 1 year or fine or both

title: Causing Miscarriage
description: Whoever voluntarily causes a woman with child to miscarry.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: Hurt
description: Whoever causes bodily pain, disease or infirmity to any person is said to cause hurt.
punishment: Up to 1 year or fine up to Rs 10,000 or both

title: Grievous Hurt
description: Emasculation, permanent privation of sight/hearing, fracture, disfiguration etc.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt
description: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 1 year or fine up to Rs 1,000 or both

title: Voluntarily Causing Grievous Hurt
description: Whoever voluntarily causes grievous hurt shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Grievous Hurt by Dangerous Weapons
description: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt by means of any instrument for shooting, stabbing or cutting, or fire or heated substance or poison.
punishment: Up to life imprisonment or 10 years + fine

title: Wrongful Restraint
description: Whoever wrongfully restrains any person shall be punished.
punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 1 month or fine up to Rs 500 or both

title: Wrongful Confinement
description: Whoever wrongfully confines any person shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 1 year or fine up to Rs 1,000 or both

title: Assault on Woman with Intent to Outrage Modesty
description: Whoever assaults or uses criminal force to any woman intending to outrage or knowing it to be likely to outrage her modesty.
punishment: 1 to 5 years + fine

title: Sexual Harassment
description: Physical contact and advances involving unwelcome and explicit sexual overtures; demand or request for sexual favours; showing pornography; making sexually coloured remarks.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: Stalking
description: Following a woman or contacting her repeatedly despite clear indication of disinterest; monitoring her use of internet, email, etc.
punishment: Up to 3 years + fine (first offence); up to 5 years + fine (repeat)

title: Kidnapping
description: Whoever kidnaps any person from India or from lawful guardianship.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Kidnapping/Abducting Woman to Compel Marriage
description: Kidnapping or abducting any woman with intent to compel her or knowing it likely that she may be compelled to marry.
punishment: Up to 10 years + fine

title: Trafficking of Person
description: Whoever recruits, transports, harbours, transfers or receives a person by using threats, force, coercion, abduction, fraud, deception for exploitation.
punishment: 7 to 10 years + fine

title: Rape
description: A man is said to commit rape if he penetrates/manipulates body of a woman without consent or with consent obtained by fear, intoxication, unsoundness, impersonation, or when under 18.
punishment: Minimum 10 years to life imprisonment + fine

title: Punishment for Rape
description: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 10 years extendable to life imprisonment and fine.
punishment: Minimum 10 years RI, extendable to life + fine

title: Rape Causing Death or Vegetative State
description: Whoever commits rape and in the course inflicts injury causing death or persistent vegetative state.
punishment: 20 years RI to life or death

title: Unnatural Offences (Read Down)
description: Carnal intercourse against the order of nature. Note: Section 377 was effectively read down by Supreme Court in Navtej Singh Johar (2018) — consensual acts between adults decriminalized.
punishment: Up to 10 years (only for non-consensual acts)

title: Theft
description: Whoever commits theft shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: Theft in Dwelling House
description: Whoever commits theft in any building, tent or vessel used as a human dwelling or for custody of property.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Theft by Clerk or Servant
description: Whoever being a clerk or servant commits theft in respect of property in possession of his master or employer.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Extortion
description: Whoever intentionally puts any person in fear of injury to that person or any other and dishonestly induces the person so put in fear to deliver property or valuable security.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: Punishment for Extortion
description: Whoever commits extortion shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: Robbery
description: In all robbery there is either theft or extortion with violence or threat of violence.
punishment: Up to 10 years + fine

title: Punishment for Robbery
description: Whoever commits robbery shall be punished.
punishment: RI up to 10 years + fine; 14 years if on highway

title: Dacoity
description: When five or more persons conjointly commit or attempt to commit robbery, every person so committing or attempting is said to commit dacoity.
punishment: Life imprisonment or RI up to 10 years + fine

title: Criminal Breach of Trust
description: Whoever commits criminal breach of trust shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: CBT by Public Servant / Banker / Agent
description: Criminal breach of trust by public servant, banker, merchant, factor, broker, attorney or agent.
punishment: Life imprisonment or up to 10 years + fine

title: Cheating
description: Whoever by deceiving any person, fraudulently or dishonestly induces the person to deliver property or to consent to retain property, or intentionally induces the person to do or omit to do anything.
punishment: Up to 1 year or fine or both

title: Punishment for Cheating
description: Whoever cheats shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 1 year or fine or both

title: Cheating and Dishonestly Inducing Delivery of Property
description: Whoever cheats and thereby dishonestly induces the person deceived to deliver any property to any person.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Mischief
description: Whoever commits mischief shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 3 months or fine or both

title: Mischief Causing Damage (Rs 50+)
description: Whoever commits mischief and thereby causes loss or damage to the amount of Rs 50 or upwards.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Criminal Trespass
description: Whoever enters into or upon property in the possession of another with intent to commit an offence or to intimidate, insult or annoy.
punishment: Up to 3 months or fine up to Rs 500 or both

title: Punishment for Criminal Trespass
description: Whoever commits criminal trespass shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 3 months or fine up to Rs 500 or both

title: House-trespass
description: Whoever commits criminal trespass by entering into or remaining in any building, tent or vessel used as a human dwelling.
punishment: Up to 1 year or fine up to Rs 1,000 or both

title: House-trespass after Preparation for Hurt/Assault
description: Whoever commits house-trespass, having made preparation for causing hurt to any person or for assaulting any person.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Lurking House-trespass by Night
description: Whoever commits lurking house-trespass after sunset and before sunrise.
punishment: Up to 3 years + fine

title: Forgery
description: Whoever commits forgery shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Forgery of Valuable Security
description: Whoever forges a document which purports to be a valuable security or a will.
punishment: Life imprisonment or up to 10 years + fine

title: Forgery for Purpose of Cheating
description: Whoever commits forgery intending that the document forged shall be used for the purpose of cheating.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Using Forged Document as Genuine
description: Whoever fraudulently or dishonestly uses as genuine any document which he knows or has reason to believe to be a forged document.
punishment: Same as forgery of that document

title: Counterfeiting Currency Notes
description: Whoever counterfeits any currency note or bank note shall be punished.
punishment: Life imprisonment or up to 10 years + fine

title: Bigamy
description: Whoever having a husband or wife living marries in any case in which such marriage is void by reason of its taking place during the life of such husband or wife.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Cruelty by Husband or Relatives
description: Whoever being the husband or the relative of the husband of a woman subjects her to cruelty (demand for dowry or harassment).
punishment: Up to 3 years + fine

title: Defamation
description: Whoever by words either spoken or intended to be read, or by signs or by visible representations, makes or publishes any imputation concerning any person intending to harm, or knowing or having reason to believe will harm the reputation of such person.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Punishment for Defamation
description: Whoever defames another shall be punished.
punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Criminal Intimidation
description: Whoever threatens another with any injury to his person, reputation or property with intent to cause alarm.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Punishment for Criminal Intimidation
description: Whoever commits the offence of criminal intimidation shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both; up to 7 years if threat to cause death/grievous hurt/fire/destruction of property

title: Word/Gesture/Act to Insult Modesty of Woman
description: Whoever intending to insult the modesty of any woman, utters any word, makes any sound or gesture, or exhibits any object, or intrudes upon the privacy of such woman.
punishment: Up to 3 years + fine

title: Criminal Conspiracy
description: When two or more persons agree to do or cause to be done an illegal act or an act which is not illegal by illegal means.
punishment: Same as abetment of the offence conspired

title: Sedition
description: Whoever brings or attempts to bring into hatred or contempt, or excites or attempts to excite disaffection towards the Government established by law in India. Note: BNS replaces sedition with a broader provision.
punishment: Life imprisonment or up to 3 years + fine

title: Abetting Mutiny
description: Whoever abets the committing of mutiny by an officer, soldier, sailor or airman.
punishment: Life imprisonment or up to 10 years + fine

title: Unlawful Assembly
description: Whoever is a member of an unlawful assembly.
punishment: Up to 6 months or fine or both

title: Joining Unlawful Assembly Armed with Deadly Weapon
description: Whoever being armed with any deadly weapon or with anything which if used as a weapon of offence is likely to cause death, is a member of an unlawful assembly.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Rioting
description: Whoever is guilty of rioting shall be punished.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Rioting Armed with Deadly Weapon
description: Whoever is guilty of rioting, being armed with a deadly weapon.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: Promoting Enmity Between Groups
description: Whoever promotes or attempts to promote disharmony or feelings of enmity, hatred or ill-will between different religious, racial, language or regional groups.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: Personating a Public Servant
description: Whoever pretends to hold any particular office as a public servant, knowing that he does not hold such office.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Wearing Garb/Token of Public Servant
description: Whoever wears any garb or carries any token resembling any garb or token used by a public servant with the intention that it may be believed that he is such a public servant.
punishment: Up to 3 months or fine up to Rs 200 or both

title: Obstructing Public Servant in Discharge of Duty
description: Whoever voluntarily obstructs any public servant in the discharge of his public functions.
punishment: Up to 3 months or fine up to Rs 500 or both

title: Giving False Evidence
description: Whoever being legally bound by an oath or by an express provision of law to state the truth, makes any statement which is false.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Punishment for False Evidence
description: Whoever intentionally gives false evidence in any stage of a judicial proceeding.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Giving False Evidence to Procure Conviction of Capital Offence
description: Whoever gives or fabricates false evidence intending to procure the conviction of any person for an offence punishable with death.
punishment: Life imprisonment or RI up to 10 years + fine

title: Causing Disappearance of Evidence / Giving False Information
description: Whoever knowing or having reason to believe that an offence has been committed, causes any evidence of the commission of that offence to disappear.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine (if capital offence); up to 3 years + fine (otherwise)

title: False Charge of Offence Made with Intent to Injure
description: Whoever with intent to cause injury to any person institutes or causes to be instituted any criminal proceeding against that person.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Harbouring Offender
description: Whoever harbours or conceals a person whom he knows or has reason to believe to be an offender.
punishment: Up to 5 years + fine (for capital offences)

title: Harbouring Offender who has Escaped or Whose Apprehension has been Ordered
description: Whenever any person convicted of or charged with an offence escapes from custody or whose apprehension has been ordered, whoever harbours or conceals that person.
punishment: Up to 7 years + fine

title: Resistance or Obstruction to Lawful Apprehension
description: Whoever intentionally offers any resistance or illegal obstruction to the lawful apprehension of himself for any offence.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Intentional Insult to Court
description: Whoever intentionally offers any insult or causes any interruption to any public servant while sitting in any stage of a judicial proceeding.
punishment: Up to 6 months or fine up to Rs 1,000 or both

title: Public Nuisance
description: A person is guilty of a public nuisance who does any act or is guilty of an illegal omission which causes common injury, danger or annoyance.
punishment: Fine up to Rs 200

title: Negligent Act Likely to Spread Infection
description: Whoever unlawfully or negligently does any act which is likely to spread the infection of any disease dangerous to life.
punishment: Up to 6 months or fine or both

title: Malignant Act Likely to Spread Infection
description: Whoever malignantly does any act which is likely to spread the infection of any disease dangerous to life.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Rash Driving on Public Way
description: Whoever drives any vehicle or rides on any public way in a manner so rash or negligent as to endanger human life.
punishment: Up to 6 months or fine up to Rs 1,000 or both

title: Obscene Acts/Songs
description: Whoever does any obscene act in any public place or sings, recites or utters any obscene song, ballad or words in any public place.
punishment: Up to 3 months or fine or both

title: Injuring or Defiling Place of Worship
description: Whoever destroys, damages or defiles any place of worship or any object held sacred by any class of persons.
punishment: Up to 2 years or fine or both

title: Deliberate Act to Outrage Religious Feelings
description: Whoever with deliberate and malicious intention of outraging the religious feelings of any class of citizens of India.
punishment: Up to 3 years or fine or both

title: Trespass on Burial Places
description: Whoever with the intention of wounding the feelings of any person or of insulting the religion of any person commits any trespass in any place of worship or on any place of sepulture or any place set apart for performance of funeral rites.
punishment: Up to 1 year or fine or both

title: Common Intention
description: When a criminal act is done by several persons in furtherance of the common intention of all, each of such persons is liable for that act in the same manner as if it were done by him alone.
punishment: Same as principal offence

title: Abetment of a Thing
description: A person abets the doing of a thing who: instigates, engages in conspiracy, intentionally aids.
punishment: Depends on offence abetted

title: Punishment of Abetment if Act Abetted is Committed
description: Whoever abets any offence shall, if the act abetted is committed, be punished with the punishment provided for the offence.
punishment: Same as principal offence

title: Abettor Present when Offence Committed
description: Whenever any person who is absent would be liable to be punished as an abettor, such person being present commits the offence.
punishment: Same as principal offence

title: Culpable Homicide
description: Whoever causes death by doing an act with the intention of causing death or with the intention of causing such bodily injury as is likely to cause death or with knowledge that he is likely by such act to cause death.
punishment: Life imprisonment or up to 10 years + fine

title: Attempt to Commit Offences Punishable with Imprisonment for Life
description: Whoever attempts to commit an offence punishable with imprisonment for life or imprisonment, and in such attempt does any act towards the commission of the offence.
punishment: Up to half the longest term provided for that offence

title: Organised Crime
description: NEW in BNS: Offence committed as part of organised crime syndicate. Includes contract killing, extortion, land grabbing, cyber crime by organised groups.
punishment: Death or life imprisonment + fine not less than Rs 10 lakhs

title: Sexual Intercourse by Deceitful Means (New)
description: NEW in BNS: Sexual intercourse with a woman by deceitful means or false promise of marriage. Not present in IPC.
punishment: Up to 10 years + fine

title: Petty Organised Crime (New)
description: NEW in BNS: Theft, snatching, cheating, unauthorised selling of tickets, public exam paper leaks by organised groups.
punishment: 1 to 7 years + fine

title: Terrorist Act (New)
description: NEW in BNS: Act with intent to threaten the unity, integrity, sovereignty, security, or economic security of India, or to strike terror in people. Includes using bombs, firearms, biological agents, etc.
punishment: Death or life imprisonment + fine

title: Gang Rape (New Provision)
description: NEW in BNS: Where a woman is raped by one or more persons constituting a group or acting in furtherance of a common intention.
punishment: Not less than 20 years RI, extendable to life + fine

title: Rape of Minor (New Enhanced)
description: BNS Section 71: Rape of woman under 18 years of age. Enhanced penalties under BNS compared to POCSO overlap.
punishment: Not less than 20 years RI, extendable to life or death
